# rF2 Shared Memory Map Vendor Snapshot

This folder contains the vendored `TheIronWolfModding/rF2SharedMemoryMapPlugin` binaries, monitor utility, and source snapshot used as the Trackside shared-memory reference.

Trackside does not own or build this plugin as part of the normal application solution. The production code should treat it as a dependency/reference for the rFactor 2 data contract, parser tests, and venue setup instructions.

The original upstream usage note is preserved in `readme.txt`, and the source documentation remains under `src/README.md`.
